---
title: Is chronic procrastination increasing over time?
date: 2026-07-15
author:
  - name: Fuschia Sirois
    url: https://fuschiasirois.com/
    orcid: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0927-277X
    affiliation: Department of Psychology, Durham University
  - name: Jameson Hirsch
    url: https://www.etsu.edu/com/psychiatry/bio/hirschj.php
    orcid: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3901-0452
    affiliation: Department of Psychiatry and Behavioral Sciences, East Tennessee State University
  - name: Cormac Monaghan
    url: https://c-monaghan.github.io/
    orcid: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9012-3060
    affiliation:
      - Hamilton Institute, Maynooth University
      - Department of Psychology, Maynooth University
  - name: Eve Fitzgerald
categories:
  - procrastination
  - meta analysis
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <a href="https://www.durham.ac.uk/staff/fuschia-sirois/">Sirois, F</a>, <a href="https://www.etsu.edu/com/psychiatry/bio/hirschj.php">Hirsch, J</a>, <strong>Monaghan, C</strong>, & Fitzgerald E. Is chronic procrastination increasing over time?
pub-status:
  status: Writing
  class: warning
  icon: fa-solid fa-pencil
---
